summary: Iteration 7: Verified formatting fixes for Four Seasons KPI Dashboard. All money values display 2 decimal places, commission percent in sale modal shows clean numbers (no floating point issues), and Payments section correctly stacks vertically on mobile. Backend API tests 14/14 passed. All 5 blocks render correctly.
passed_tests: Money values show exactly 2 decimal places: $25,720.00, $3,326.50, $8,573.33, etc.
Commission percent in sale modal displays clean number (e.g., 9% not 9.000000001%)
Payments section stacks vertically on mobile (375px) with grid-cols-1
Payments section shows 3 columns on desktop with grid-cols-3
Block 1 (green): My Money - 5 KPIs (Revenue, Commission, Deals, Rate, Ticket) + 3 payment items
Block 2 (amber): How Can I Earn More? - Under Book Price with % badge + SPIFF breakdown
Block 3 (blue): What Am I Selling? - 3 charts (Unit Type pie, Revenue bar, Monthly area)
Block 4 (purple): Closed Sales table - click opens sale detail modal with commission breakdown
Block 5 (red): Action Required! - 6 follow-ups with pulsing icon, click opens client modal
Pay Period filter works correctly - changes data when selecting different period
Update button refreshes data and shows toast notification
Backend formulas verified: closing_rate = closed_deals/leads*100, avg_ticket = revenue/closed_deals
SPIFF brand percentages consistent (Mitsubishi 33.3% when 1 of 3 sales)
No console errors on page load

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All formatting fixes verified, all blocks working

seed_data_creation: None - uses live Google Sheet data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 focused on formatting fixes: (1) All $ amounts use minimumFractionDigits:2 showing exactly 2 decimal places, (2) commission_percent rounded in backend to avoid floating point, (3) Payments section uses grid-cols-1 on mobile, grid-cols-3 sm:grid-cols-3 on desktop. Known SPIFF discrepancy ($254 difference between brand breakdown total and SPIF column) is source data issue, not code bug. Dashboard URL: https://sales-mgmt-app.preview.emergentagent.com
